heading: Authorization of appropriations

notes: References in TextThis subchapter, referred to in subsec. (a), was in the original “this title”, meaning title III of , , , which is classified principally to this subchapter. For complete classification of title III to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 110–403122 Stat. 4264Oct. 13, 2008

children.heading: In general1So in original. No subsec. (b) has been enacted.1
children.label: a In general1So in original. No subsec. (b) has been enacted.1
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated for each fiscal year such sums as may be necessary to carry out this subchapter.
